mapper.insert: INSERT INTO price_list ( priceListId,FDocumentStatus, FName, FNumber, FDescription, FCurrencyID, FSupplierID, F_GYSLB, FPricer, FPriceObject, FPriceType, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{priceListId}, #{FName}NULL, #{FDocumentStatus}NULL, #{FNumber}NULL, #{FDescription}NULL, #{FCurrencyID}NULL, #{FSupplierID}NULL, #{FGYSLB}NULL, #{FPricer}NULL, #{FPriceObject}NULL, #{FPriceType}NULL, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, FName,FDocumentStatus, FNumber, FDescription, FCurrencyID, FSupplierID, F_GYSLB AS FGYSLB, FPricer, FPriceObject, FPriceType, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM price_list WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT pl.id, pl.fnumber, pl.FName, pl.FDocumentStatus, sp.NAME AS FSupplierID, b.number as FMaterialId, ple.FMaterialName, pl.priceListId, pl.FNumber, pl.FPriceType, pl.FCurrencyID, pl.FPriceObject, ple.F_GGSM, ple.FTaxPrice, ple.F_WBZC, ple.F_WBZK, ple.F_WBZG, ple.F_MZ, ple.F_JZ, ple.F_GCHH, ple.F_bzsm, ple.FEntryEffectiveDate, ple.FEntryExpiryDate FROM price_list pl LEFT JOIN price_list_entry ple on pl.FNumber = ple.price_list_number LEFT JOIN by_material b on ple.FMaterialId = b.k3_id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bm ON pl.FCurrencyID = bm.kingdee AND bm.category = 'currency' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd ON pl.F_GYSLB = bd.kingdee AND bd.category = 'Supply_category' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bld ON pl.FPriceType = bld.kingdee AND bld.category = 'price_type' LEFT JOIN supplier sp ON pl.FSupplierID = sp.supplierid WHERE pl.fnumber = #{FNumber} LIMIT 1

SELECT pl.id, pl.priceListId, pl.FName, pl.FDocumentStatus, pl.FNumber, pl.FDescription, bm.NAME AS FCurrencyID, sp.NAME AS FSupplierID, bd.name AS FGYSLB, pl.FPricer, pl.FPriceObject, bld.name as FPriceType, pl.createdBy, pl.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM price_list pl LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bm ON pl.FCurrencyID = bm.kingdee AND bm.category = 'currency'
LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd ON pl.F_GYSLB = bd.kingdee AND bd.category = 'Supply_category'
LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bld ON pl.FPriceType = bld.kingdee AND bld.category = 'price_type'
LEFT JOIN supplier sp ON pl.FSupplierID = sp.supplierid WHERE FSupplierID = #{supplierId} ORDER BY pl.created_at DESC

SELECT pl.id, pl.priceListId, pl.FName, pl.FDocumentStatus, pl.FDescription, bm.NAME AS FCurrencyID, sp.NAME AS FSupplierID, bd.name AS FGYSLB, pl.FPricer, pl.FPriceObject, bld.name as FPriceType, pl.createdBy, pl.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM price_list pl LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bm ON pl.FCurrencyID = bm.kingdee AND bm.category = 'currency'
LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd ON pl.F_GYSLB = bd.kingdee AND bd.category = 'Supply_category'
LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bld ON pl.FPriceType = bld.kingdee AND bld.category = 'price_type'
LEFT JOIN supplier sp ON pl.FSupplierID = sp.supplierid WHERE F_GYSLB = #{supplierCategory} ORDER BY pl.created_at DESC

SELECT MIN(pl.id) AS id, pl.fnumber, pl.FName, sp.NAME AS FSupplierID, b.number AS FMaterialId, ple.FMaterialName, pl.priceListId, pl.FPriceType, pl.FCurrencyID, pl.FPriceObject, pl.FDocumentStatus, MIN(ple.F_GGSM) AS F_GGSM, MIN(ple.FPrice) AS FPrice, MIN(ple.FTaxPrice) AS FTaxPrice, MIN(ple.F_WBZC) AS F_WBZC, MIN(ple.F_WBZK) AS F_WBZK, MIN(ple.F_WBZG) AS F_WBZG, MIN(ple.F_MZ) AS F_MZ, MIN(ple.F_JZ) AS F_JZ, MIN(ple.F_GCHH) AS F_GCHH, MIN(ple.F_bzsm) AS F_bzsm, MIN(ple.FEntryEffectiveDate) AS FEntryEffectiveDate, MIN(ple.FEntryExpiryDate) AS FEntryExpiryDate FROM price_list pl INNER JOIN price_list_entry ple ON pl.FNumber = ple.price_list_number INNER JOIN by_material b ON ple.FMaterialId = b.k3_id LEFT JOIN supplier sp ON pl.FSupplierID = sp.supplierid ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT MIN(pl.id) AS id, pl.fnumber, pl.FName, sp.NAME AS FSupplierID, b.number AS FMaterialId, ple.FMaterialName, pl.priceListId, pl.FPriceType, pl.FCurrencyID, pl.FPriceObject, MIN(ple.F_GGSM) AS F_GGSM, MIN(ple.FPrice) AS FPrice, MIN(ple.FTaxPrice) AS FTaxPrice, MIN(ple.F_WBZC) AS F_WBZC, MIN(ple.F_WBZK) AS F_WBZK, MIN(ple.F_WBZG) AS F_WBZG, MIN(ple.F_MZ) AS F_MZ, MIN(ple.F_JZ) AS F_JZ, MIN(ple.F_GCHH) AS F_GCHH, MIN(ple.F_bzsm) AS F_bzsm, MIN(ple.FEntryEffectiveDate) AS FEntryEffectiveDate, MIN(ple.FEntryExpiryDate) AS FEntryExpiryDate FROM price_list pl INNER JOIN price_list_entry ple ON pl.FNumber = ple.price_list_number INNER JOIN by_material b ON ple.FMaterialId = b.k3_id LEFT JOIN supplier sp ON pl.FSupplierID = sp.supplierid ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT suer.NAME AS FSupplierName, ple.FMaterialName, ple.F_bzsm, ple.FPrice, ple.FTaxPrice, bydy.name as FCurrencyID, ple.FDownPrice, ple.F_dzshqdl, ple.F_QDL, byd.name as FGYSLB, ple.F_BCGG, ple.FEntryExpiryDate, ple.fentryEffectiveDate, ple.Fxjr FROM price_list_entry ple LEFT JOIN price_list pl ON ple.price_list_number = pl.FNumber LEFT JOIN supplier suer ON pl.FSupplierID = suer.supplierid LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary byd ON pl.F_GYSLB = byd.kingdee and byd.category='Supply_category' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bydy ON pl.FCurrencyID = bydy.kingdee and bydy.category='currency' WHERE ple.FMaterialId = #{materialId} ORDER BY ple.FPrice ASC;
